name: Casserole Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
4 cups Cooked Noodles, or other cooked pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine spinach, cream of mushroom soup, garlic, and seasonings in a small bowl.
2. Spread the mixture evenly over noodles or other pasta in a buttered 3-quart flat casserole.
3. Distribute chopped sausage over the spinach mixture.
4. Sprinkle chopped onion on top of the sausage.
5. Blend egg into ricotta cheese.
6. Spread the egg mixture over everything.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden.
8. Allow to cool slightly.
9. Top with garnish of tomato and parsley.
